name: Circuit City Stores, Inc. v. Adams
summary: The Supreme Court held that the FAA Section 1 exemption for workers 'engaged in foreign or interstate commerce' applies only to transportation workers, not to all employment contracts, rejecting a broader reading that would exempt all workers from the FAA.
significance: This is the foundational precedent defining the scope of the FAA Section 1 exemption; the Court held the exemption applies to transportation workers broadly but limited its reach, and both parties rely on its reasoning to support their interpretations.
